321 GG0130H1_ON_OFF_FTWR_STRT_CD GG0130H1_ON_OFF_FTWR_STRT_CD GG0130H1 Admission Performance Footwear Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in putting on and taking off footwear, at the time of admission. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in putting on and taking off footwear, at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal
